<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right (`>`). The cell directly ahead at row 02 column C is lava, so I must not move forward. The safe path to the goal at row 04 column D is to go down first, so I need to turn right to face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing down. The cell directly ahead at row 03 column B is safe, while the lava at column C blocks the direct right path. Moving forward is the best next step toward the goal at row 04 column D.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B, facing down (`v`). The goal `O` is at row 04 column D. Moving forward would take me to row 04 column B, which is safe, but I need to eventually get to the right toward the goal while avoiding the lava in column C. Turning right would face me left into a wall, so the best first step is to move forward into the safe cell below.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing down (`v`). The goal `O` is at row 04 column D, and the cell in front of me at row 05 column B is a wall, so I cannot move forward. To get to the goal safely, I need to face right and move toward column D, avoiding the lava in column C on rows 02 and 03 by staying on row 04.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B, facing right (`>`). The goal `O` is at row 04 column D, but the cell directly in front of me at row 04 column C is safe `.` and moving forward gets me closer to the goal without touching lava. So the next action is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column C facing right (`>`). The goal `O` is immediately to my right at row 04 column D, and that cell is safe. I should move forward to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
